Question:
Among participants in the 2005-2012 NHANES data, include paricipants who meet all of these criteria: self-reported diagnosis of diabetes is yes and diabetes onset >=30  and age at screening >=30
We will exclude patients who were pregnant at the time of the exam, exclude patipant whose difference between the duration of diabetes and duration of insulin therapy, calculated as (age at screening - diabetes onset)- insulin therapy duration is equal or less than 1 year.
We will calculate the weighted prevalence using exam weights. We will look at prevalence of clinically relevant depression, defined by the following 9 questionaires:
"have little interest in doing things", "feeling down, depressed, or hopeless", "trouble sleeping or sleeping too much", "feeling tired or having little energy", "poor appetite or overeating", "feeling bad about yourself", "trouble concentrating on things", "moving or speaking slowly or too fast", "thought you would be better off dead". 
The total score from the nine questions were calculated where each question has value of Not at all (0), Several days (1), More than half the days (2), Nearly every day (3), if value is null assign (0), and the total score >=10 was defined as clinically relevant depression and else was not.
Structured Question:
Analysis Type: weighted prevalence (exam)

Dataset: NHANES

Period of Interest: 2005-2012

Inclusion Criteria:
- self-reported diagnosis of diabetes = yes
- diabetes onset >= 30
- age at screening >= 30

Exclusion Criteria:
- pregnant at the time of the exam
- (age at screening - diabetes onset) - insulin therapy duration <= 1 year

Grouping Variables: None

Outcome:
- clinically relevant depression = 1 if total score >= 10; 0 otherwise
  total score calculated as the sum of the scores from the following 9 questionnaires:
    - "have little interest in doing things"
    - "feeling down, depressed, or hopeless"
    - "trouble sleeping or sleeping too much"
    - "feeling tired or having little energy"
    - "poor appetite or overeating"
    - "feeling bad about yourself"
    - "trouble concentrating on things"
    - "moving or speaking slowly or too fast"
    - "thought you would be better off dead"
  Each question's score is mapped as:
    - Not at all = 0
    - Several days = 1
    - More than half the days = 2
    - Nearly every day = 3
  If a question's value is null, assign 0.

-- STEP 1: Create temp_master_weight

-- TEMP TABLE FOR weight
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_weight;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_weight AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 8.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_d
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number,

-- FINAL MASTER TABLE
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS final_master_table;
CREATE TABLE final_master_table AS
SELECT
    a.respondent_sequence_number,
    t0."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes",
    t1."age_when_first_told_you_had_diabetes",
    t2."age_in_years_at_screening",
    t3."pregnancy_status_at_exam",
    t4."how_long_taking_insulin",
    t5."have_little_interest_in_doing_things",
    t6."feeling_down_depressed_or_hopeless",
    t7."trouble_sleeping_or_sleeping_too_much",
    t8."feeling_tired_or_having_little_energy",
    t9."poor_appetite_or_overeating",
    t10."feeling_bad_about_yourself",
    t11."trouble_concentrating_on_things",
    t12."moving_or_speaking_slowly_or_too_fast",
    t13."thought_you_would_be_better_off_dead"
FROM temp_all_ids a
LEFT JOIN temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes t0 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t0.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_age_when_first_told_you_had_diabetes t1 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t1.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening t2 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t2.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_pregnancy_status_at_exam t3 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t3.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_how_long_taking_insulin t4 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t4.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_have_little_interest_in_doing_things t5 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t5.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_feeling_down_depressed_or_hopeless t6 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t6.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_trouble_sleeping_or_sleeping_too_much t7 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t7.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_feeling_tired_or_having_little_energy t8 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t8.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_poor_appetite_or_overeating t9 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t9.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_feeling_bad_about_yourself t10 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t10.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_trouble_concentrating_on_things t11 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t11.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_moving_or_speaking_slowly_or_too_fast t12 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t12.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_thought_you_would_be_better_off_dead t13 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t13.respondent_sequence_number;

CREATE INDEX idx_final_master_respondent_sequence_number    
    ON final_master_table (respondent_sequence_number);


-- Clean up final_master_table
DELETE FROM final_master_table
WHERE respondent_sequence_number NOT IN (
    SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM weight_design
);


-- ========== STEP 1: Inclusion ==========

-- STEP 1.1: Includes all patients with self-reported diagnosis of diabetes = 'Yes'
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step1 AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM final_master_table
WHERE "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" = 'Yes';

-- STEP 1.2: From the above group, include only those with diabetes onset >= 30 years
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."age_when_first_told_you_had_diabetes" >= 30;

-- STEP 1.3: From the above group, include only those with age at screening >= 30 years
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step3 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."age_in_years_at_screening" >= 30;

-- ========== STEP 2: Exclusions ==========

-- STEP 2.1: Exclude patients who were pregnant at the time of the exam
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step1 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step3 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."pregnancy_status_at_exam" IS NULL
   OR f."pregnancy_status_at_exam" NOT IN ('Yes, positive lab pregnancy test or self-reported pregnant at exam');

-- STEP 2.2: Exclude participants whose difference between duration of diabetes and duration of insulin therapy is <= 1 year
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE (f."age_in_years_at_screening" - f."age_when_first_told_you_had_diabetes" - f."how_long_taking_insulin") IS NULL
   OR (f."age_in_years_at_screening" - f."age_when_first_told_you_had_diabetes" - f."how_long_taking_insulin") > 1;

-- ========== STEP 3: Cohort ==========

-- The final temp table in the exclusion sequence becomes temp_cohort.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cohort AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step2;

-- ========== STEP 4: Variables ==========

-- 4.1 Clinically relevant depression
-- Step 1: Handle NULL values for each of the 9 depression questions, assigning '0' if NULL.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_depression_questions_pre_mapped AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE WHEN f."have_little_interest_in_doing_things" IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE f."have_little_interest_in_doing_things" END AS "have_little_interest_in_doing_things_pre_mapped",
  CASE WHEN f."feeling_down_depressed_or_hopeless" IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE f."feeling_down_depressed_or_hopeless" END AS "feeling_down_depressed_or_hopeless_pre_mapped",
  CASE WHEN f."trouble_sleeping_or_sleeping_too_much" IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE f."trouble_sleeping_or_sleeping_too_much" END AS "trouble_sleeping_or_sleeping_too_much_pre_mapped",
  CASE WHEN f."feeling_tired_or_having_little_energy" IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE f."feeling_tired_or_having_little_energy" END AS "feeling_tired_or_having_little_energy_pre_mapped",
  CASE WHEN f."poor_appetite_or_overeating" IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE f."poor_appetite_or_overeating" END AS "poor_appetite_or_overeating_pre_mapped",
  CASE WHEN f."feeling_bad_about_yourself" IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE f."feeling_bad_about_yourself" END AS "feeling_bad_about_yourself_pre_mapped",
  CASE WHEN f."trouble_concentrating_on_things" IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE f."trouble_concentrating_on_things" END AS "trouble_concentrating_on_things_pre_mapped",
  CASE WHEN f."moving_or_speaking_slowly_or_too_fast" IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE f."moving_or_speaking_slowly_or_too_fast" END AS "moving_or_speaking_slowly_or_too_fast_pre_mapped",
  CASE WHEN f."thought_you_would_be_better_off_dead" IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE f."thought_you_would_be_better_off_dead" END AS "thought_you_would_be_better_off_dead_pre_mapped"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Step 2: Map each question's value to a score (0, 1, 2, 3).
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_depression_scores AS
SELECT
  "respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE "have_little_interest_in_doing_things_pre_mapped"
    WHEN 'Not at all' THEN 0
    WHEN 'Several days' THEN 1
    WHEN 'More than half the days' THEN 2
    WHEN 'Nearly every day' THEN 3
    WHEN '0' THEN 0 -- For NULLs mapped to '0'
    ELSE NULL
  END AS "have_little_interest_in_doing_things_score",
  CASE "feeling_down_depressed_or_hopeless_pre_mapped"
    WHEN 'Not at all' THEN 0
    WHEN 'Several days' THEN 1
    WHEN 'More than half the days' THEN 2
    WHEN 'Nearly every day' THEN 3
    WHEN '0' THEN 0
    ELSE NULL
  END AS "feeling_down_depressed_or_hopeless_score",
  CASE "trouble_sleeping_or_sleeping_too_much_pre_mapped"
    WHEN 'Not at all' THEN 0
    WHEN 'Several days' THEN 1
    WHEN 'More than half the days' THEN 2
    WHEN 'Nearly every day' THEN 3
    WHEN '0' THEN 0
    ELSE NULL
  END AS "trouble_sleeping_or_sleeping_too_much_score",
  CASE "feeling_tired_or_having_little_energy_pre_mapped"
    WHEN 'Not at all' THEN 0
    WHEN 'Several days' THEN 1
    WHEN 'More than half the days' THEN 2
    WHEN 'Nearly every day' THEN 3
    WHEN '0' THEN 0
    ELSE NULL
  END AS "feeling_tired_or_having_little_energy_score",
  CASE "poor_appetite_or_overeating_pre_mapped"
    WHEN 'Not at all' THEN 0
    WHEN 'Several days' THEN 1
    WHEN 'More than half the days' THEN 2
    WHEN 'Nearly every day' THEN 3
    WHEN '0' THEN 0
    ELSE NULL
  END AS "poor_appetite_or_overeating_score",
  CASE "feeling_bad_about_yourself_pre_mapped"
    WHEN 'Not at all' THEN 0
    WHEN 'Several days' THEN 1
    WHEN 'More than half the days' THEN 2
    WHEN 'Nearly every day' THEN 3
    WHEN '0' THEN 0
    ELSE NULL
  END AS "feeling_bad_about_yourself_score",
  CASE "trouble_concentrating_on_things_pre_mapped"
    WHEN 'Not at all' THEN 0
    WHEN 'Several days' THEN 1
    WHEN 'More than half the days' THEN 2
    WHEN 'Nearly every day' THEN 3
    WHEN '0' THEN 0
    ELSE NULL
  END AS "trouble_concentrating_on_things_score",
  CASE "moving_or_speaking_slowly_or_too_fast_pre_mapped"
    WHEN 'Not at all' THEN 0
    WHEN 'Several days' THEN 1
    WHEN 'More than half the days' THEN 2
    WHEN 'Nearly every day' THEN 3
    WHEN '0' THEN 0
    ELSE NULL
  END AS "moving_or_speaking_slowly_or_too_fast_score",
  CASE "thought_you_would_be_better_off_dead_pre_mapped"
    WHEN 'Not at all' THEN 0
    WHEN 'Several days' THEN 1
    WHEN 'More than half the days' THEN 2
    WHEN 'Nearly every day' THEN 3
    WHEN '0' THEN 0
    ELSE NULL
  END AS "thought_you_would_be_better_off_dead_score"
FROM temp_depression_questions_pre_mapped;

-- Step 3: Calculate total score by summing all 9 question scores.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_total_depression_score AS
SELECT
  "respondent_sequence_number",
  COALESCE("have_little_interest_in_doing_things_score", 0) +
  COALESCE("feeling_down_depressed_or_hopeless_score", 0) +
  COALESCE("trouble_sleeping_or_sleeping_too_much_score", 0) +
  COALESCE("feeling_tired_or_having_little_energy_score", 0) +
  COALESCE("poor_appetite_or_overeating_score", 0) +
  COALESCE("feeling_bad_about_yourself_score", 0) +
  COALESCE("trouble_concentrating_on_things_score", 0) +
  COALESCE("moving_or_speaking_slowly_or_too_fast_score", 0) +
  COALESCE("thought_you_would_be_better_off_dead_score", 0) AS "total_score"
FROM temp_depression_scores;

-- Step 4: Determine clinically relevant depression based on total score.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_clinically_relevant_depression AS
SELECT
  "respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN "total_score" >= 10 THEN 1
    ELSE 0
  END AS "clinically_relevant_depression"
FROM temp_total_depression_score;

-- ========== STEP 5: Final Table ==========
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_table AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  crd."clinically_relevant_depression"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN temp_clinically_relevant_depression crd ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = crd."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 6: Final Output ==========
SELECT * FROM temp_final_table;

-- STEP: Create merged final table with design variables + in_analysis flag
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_final_with_weights;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_with_weights AS
SELECT 
    wd."respondent_sequence_number",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_psu",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_stratum",
    wd."survey_weight",
    CASE WHEN ft."respondent_sequence_number" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "in_analysis",
    ft."clinically_relevant_depression"
FROM weight_design wd
LEFT JOIN temp_final_table ft
  ON wd."respondent_sequence_number" = ft."respondent_sequence_number";

suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(dplyr))
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(broom))
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tibble))

    identifier_vars <- c("respondent_sequence_number")
    outcome_vars <- c("clinically_relevant_depression")
    weight_vars <- c("survey_weight","masked_variance_pseudo_psu","masked_variance_pseudo_stratum","in_analysis")

    cohort <- df[df$in_analysis == 1, names(df) != "in_analysis"]


    outcome_roles <- c()
    outcome_roles["clinically_relevant_depression"] <- "outcome"


    summarize_variable <- function(column, name) {
    n_unique <- length(unique(na.omit(column)))
    na_count <- sum(is.na(column))

    if (name %in% identifier_vars) {
        category <- "identifier"
        summary_info <- paste0("Total rows = ", nrow(cohort))

    } else if (name %in% outcome_vars) {
        # Assign its special role (e.g., "outcome", "mediator")
        category <- ifelse(!is.na(outcome_roles[name]), outcome_roles[name], "outcome")

        # Generate a summary based on its underlying data type
        underlying_type <- case_when(
        n_unique == 2                                 ~ "binary",
        is.numeric(column) & n_unique > 2             ~ "numerical",
        is.character(column) | is.factor(column)      ~ "categorical",
        TRUE                                          ~ "other"
        )

        if (underlying_type == "numerical") {
        mean_val <- round(mean(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        sd_val   <- round(sd(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        summary_info <- paste0("mean = ", mean_val, ", sd = ", sd_val)
        } else if (underlying_type %in% c("categorical", "binary")) {
        tbl <- prop.table(table(column)) * 100
        tbl <- round(tbl, 1)
        summary_info <- paste0(names(tbl), ": ", tbl, "%", collapse = "; ")
        } else {
        summary_info <- NA
        }

    

    } else if (name %in% weight_vars) {
        category <- "weight"
        summary_info <- "Weight variable" 
    

    } else {
        # This block handles regular predictors
        category <- case_when(
        n_unique == 2                                 ~ "binary",
        is.numeric(column) & n_unique > 2             ~ "numerical",
        is.character(column) | is.factor(column)      ~ "categorical",
        TRUE                                          ~ "other"
        )

        if (category == "numerical") {
        mean_val <- round(mean(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        sd_val   <- round(sd(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        summary_info <- paste0("mean = ", mean_val, ", sd = ", sd_val)
        } else if (category %in% c("categorical", "binary")) {
        tbl <- prop.table(table(column)) * 100
        tbl <- round(tbl, 1)
        summary_info <- paste0(names(tbl), ": ", tbl, "%", collapse = "; ")
        } else {
        summary_info <- NA
        }
    }

    data.frame(
        variable   = name,
        category   = category,
        n_unique   = n_unique,
        na_count   = na_count,
        summary    = summary_info,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    }

    report <- bind_rows(
    lapply(names(cohort), function(col_name) {
        summarize_variable(cohort[[col_name]], col_name)
    })
    )

    identifier_vars  <- report$variable[report$category == "identifier"]
    cat("Identifier Variables:\n");   print(identifier_vars);   cat("\n")

    weight_vars <- report$variable[report$category == "weight"]; cat("Weight Variables: "); print(weight_vars); psu_var <- weight_vars[grepl("psu", weight_vars, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]; cat("PSU:", psu_var); stratum_var <- weight_vars[grepl("stratum", weight_vars, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]; cat("Stratum:", stratum_var); weight_var <- weight_vars[grepl("weight", weight_vars, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]; cat("Weight:", weight_var); in_analysis_var <- weight_vars[grepl("in_analysis", weight_vars, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]; cat("In Analysis:", in_analysis_var)

    binary_vars      <- report$variable[report$category == "binary"]
    cat("Binary Variables:\n");       print(binary_vars);       cat("\n")
    print(binary_vars)

    categorical_vars <- report$variable[report$category == "categorical"]
    cat("Categorical Variables:\n");  print(categorical_vars);  cat("\n")
    print(categorical_vars)

    numerical_vars   <- report$variable[report$category == "numerical"]
    cat("Numerical Variables:\n");    print(numerical_vars);    cat("\n")
    print(numerical_vars)

    
    

    outcome_var     <- report$variable[report$category %in% c("outcome")]
    cat("Outcome Variables:\n");      print(outcome_var);      cat("\n")
    

    
    library(survey)
    options(survey.lonely.psu = "adjust")
        
    
    group_vars_list <- report$variable[report$category %in% c("categorical", "binary")]
    
    # Loop through the variables and ensure they are clean factors in the 'df' dataframe.
    for (var in group_vars_list) {
    if (var %in% names(df)) {
        df[[var]] <- factor(trimws(as.character(df[[var]])))
    }
    }
        
    
    df[[outcome_var]] <- ifelse(tolower(df[[outcome_var]]) == "yes", 1,
                    ifelse(tolower(df[[outcome_var]]) == "no", 0,
                    ifelse(grepl("1", as.character(df[[outcome_var]])), 1,
                    ifelse(grepl("0", as.character(df[[outcome_var]])), 0,
                            as.numeric(df[[outcome_var]])))))


    varformula <- as.formula(paste0("~", outcome_var))
        
    
    survey_design <- svydesign(
        ids     = as.formula(paste0("~", psu_var)),
        strata  = as.formula(paste0("~", stratum_var)),
        weights = as.formula(paste0("~", weight_var)),
        data    = df,
        nest    = TRUE
        )
    survey_design <- subset(survey_design, in_analysis ==1)
        
    
    # Calculate Overall Prevalence.
    total_prev <- svymean(varformula, survey_design, na.rm = TRUE)
    total_conf <- confint(total_prev)

    # Initialize a list to store pairwise results
    pairwise_results <- list()

    # Loop through each grouping variable
    all_strat_results <- lapply(group_vars_list, function(current_group_var) {

        byformula <- as.formula(paste0("~", current_group_var))
        test_formula <- as.formula(paste0(outcome_var, " ~ ", current_group_var))

        # Prevalence and confidence intervals
        strat_prev <- svyby(varformula, byformula, survey_design, svymean, na.rm = TRUE)
        strat_conf <- confint(strat_prev)

        strat_result <- as_tibble(strat_prev) %>%
            cbind(strat_conf) %>%
            rename(
                Group = 1,
                prevalence = 2,
                conf_low = `2.5 %`,
                conf_high = `97.5 %`
            ) %>%
            mutate(Variable = current_group_var, .before = 1)

        # --- Global P-value ---
        group_levels <- levels(factor(df[[current_group_var]]))
        num_levels <- length(group_levels)
        global_p_value <- NA_real_

        test_result <- NULL
        test_p <- NA_real_

        if (num_levels == 2) {
            test_result <- tryCatch(
                svyttest(test_formula, survey_design),
                error = function(e) NULL
            )
        } else if (num_levels > 2) {
            chisq_formula <- as.formula(paste0("~", outcome_var, " + ", current_group_var))
            test_result <- tryCatch(
                svychisq(chisq_formula, survey_design),
                error = function(e) NULL
            )
        }

        if (!is.null(test_result)) {
            test_p <- tryCatch(test_result$p.value, error = function(e) NA_real_)
        }
        global_p_value <- test_p

        # Add global p-value only to the first row
        strat_result$`P-value` <- ""
        strat_result$`P-value`[1] <- if (!is.na(global_p_value)) round(global_p_value, 4) else NA_character_

        # Keep only the columns needed in the final result table
        strat_result <- strat_result %>%
            dplyr::select(Variable, Group, prevalence, conf_low, conf_high, `P-value`)

        # --- Pairwise p-values table (kept as before) ---
        pairwise_df <- tibble(
            Variable = character(),
            Comparison = character(),
            `P-value` = numeric()
        )

        if (num_levels > 2) {
            all_pairs <- combn(group_levels, 2, simplify = FALSE)
            for (pair in all_pairs) {
                pair_name <- paste(pair[1], "vs", pair[2], sep = "_")
                pair_design <- subset(survey_design, get(current_group_var) %in% pair)
                test_result <- try(svyttest(test_formula, pair_design), silent = TRUE)
                if (!inherits(test_result, "try-error")) {
                    pairwise_df <- bind_rows(pairwise_df, tibble(
                        Variable = current_group_var,
                        Comparison = pair_name,
                        `P-value` = round(test_result$p.value, 4)
                    ))
                }
            }
        }

        # Store in global list
        pairwise_results[[current_group_var]] <<- pairwise_df

        return(strat_result)
    })

    
    # Combine into a final result table
    total_result_df <- tibble(
        Variable = "Overall",
        Group = "Overall",
        prevalence = as.numeric(coef(total_prev)),
        conf_low = as.numeric(total_conf[1]),
        conf_high = as.numeric(total_conf[2]),
        `P-value` = ""
    )

    combined_strat_df <- bind_rows(all_strat_results)
    result_table <- bind_rows(total_result_df, combined_strat_df) %>%
        dplyr::select(Variable, Group, prevalence, conf_low, conf_high, `P-value`)

    # Combine pairwise p-values into one data frame (unchanged)
    pairwise_pvalue_table <- bind_rows(pairwise_results)

Question:
Among participants in the 2005-2012 NHANES data, include paricipants who meet all of these criteria: self-reported diagnosis of diabetes is yes and diabetes onset >=30  and age at screening >=30
We will exclude patients who were pregnant at the time of the exam, exclude patipant whose difference between the duration of diabetes and duration of insulin therapy, calculated as (age at screening - diabetes onset)- insulin therapy duration is equal or less than 1 year.
We will calculate the weighted prevalence using exam weights. We will look at prevalence of clinically relevant depression, defined by the following 9 questionaires:
"have little interest in doing things", "feeling down, depressed, or hopeless", "trouble sleeping or sleeping too much", "feeling tired or having little energy", "poor appetite or overeating", "feeling bad about yourself", "trouble concentrating on things", "moving or speaking slowly or too fast", "thought you would be better off dead". 
The total score from the nine questions were calculated where each question has value of Not at all (0), Several days (1), More than half the days (2), Nearly every day (3), if value is null assign (0), and the total score >=10 was defined as clinically relevant depression and else was not.
Structured Question:
Analysis Type: weighted prevalence (exam)

Dataset: NHANES

Period of Interest: 2005-2012

Inclusion Criteria:
- self-reported diagnosis of diabetes = yes
- diabetes onset >= 30
- age at screening >= 30

Exclusion Criteria:
- pregnant at the time of the exam
- (age at screening - diabetes onset) - insulin therapy duration <= 1 year

Grouping Variables: None

Outcome:
- clinically relevant depression = 1 if total score >= 10; 0 otherwise
  total score calculated as the sum of the scores from the following 9 questionnaires:
    - "have little interest in doing things"
    - "feeling down, depressed, or hopeless"
    - "trouble sleeping or sleeping too much"
    - "feeling tired or having little energy"
    - "poor appetite or overeating"
    - "feeling bad about yourself"
    - "trouble concentrating on things"
    - "moving or speaking slowly or too fast"
    - "thought you would be better off dead"
  Each question's score is mapped as:
    - Not at all = 0
    - Several days = 1
    - More than half the days = 2
    - Nearly every day = 3
  If a question's value is null, assign 0.

-- STEP 1: Create temp_master_weight

-- TEMP TABLE FOR weight
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_weight;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_weight AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 8.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_d
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 8.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_e
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL

       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 8.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_f

-- FINAL MASTER TABLE
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS final_master_table;
CREATE TABLE final_master_table AS
SELECT
    a.respondent_sequence_number,
    t0."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes",
    t1."age_when_first_told_you_had_diabetes",
    t2."age_in_years_at_screening",
    t3."pregnancy_status_at_exam",
    t4."how_long_taking_insulin",
    t5."have_little_interest_in_doing_things",
    t6."feeling_down_depressed_or_hopeless",
    t7."trouble_sleeping_or_sleeping_too_much",
    t8."feeling_tired_or_having_little_energy",
    t9."poor_appetite_or_overeating",
    t10."feeling_bad_about_yourself",
    t11."trouble_concentrating_on_things",
    t12."moving_or_speaking_slowly_or_too_fast",
    t13."thought_you_would_be_better_off_dead"
FROM temp_all_ids a
LEFT JOIN temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes t0 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t0.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_age_when_first_told_you_had_diabetes t1 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t1.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening t2 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t2.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_pregnancy_status_at_exam t3 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t3.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_how_long_taking_insulin t4 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t4.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_have_little_interest_in_doing_things t5 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t5.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_feeling_down_depressed_or_hopeless t6 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t6.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_trouble_sleeping_or_sleeping_too_much t7 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t7.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_feeling_tired_or_having_little_energy t8 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t8.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_poor_appetite_or_overeating t9 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t9.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_feeling_bad_about_yourself t10 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t10.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_trouble_concentrating_on_things t11 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t11.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_moving_or_speaking_slowly_or_too_fast t12 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t12.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_thought_you_would_be_better_off_dead t13 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t13.respondent_sequence_number;

CREATE INDEX idx_final_master_respondent_sequence_number    
    ON final_master_table (respondent_sequence_number);


-- Clean up final_master_table
DELETE FROM final_master_table
WHERE respondent_sequence_number NOT IN (
    SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM weight_design
);


-- ========== STEP 1: Inclusion ==========

-- STEP 1.1: Includes all patients with self-reported diagnosis of diabetes = 'Yes'
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step1 AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM final_master_table
WHERE "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" = 'Yes';

-- STEP 1.2: From the above group, include only those with diabetes onset >= 30
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."age_when_first_told_you_had_diabetes" >= 30;

-- STEP 1.3: From the above group, include only those with age at screening >= 30
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step3 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."age_in_years_at_screening" >= 30;

-- ========== STEP 2: Exclusions ==========

-- STEP 2.1: Exclude patients who were pregnant at the time of the exam
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step1 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step3 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."pregnancy_status_at_exam" IS NULL
   OR f."pregnancy_status_at_exam" NOT IN ('Yes, positive lab pregnancy test or self-reported pregnant at exam');

-- STEP 2.2: Exclude participants whose difference between duration of diabetes and insulin therapy is <= 1 year
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE (f."age_in_years_at_screening" - f."age_when_first_told_you_had_diabetes") - f."how_long_taking_insulin" > 1
   OR (f."age_in_years_at_screening" IS NULL OR f."age_when_first_told_you_had_diabetes" IS NULL OR f."how_long_taking_insulin" IS NULL);

-- ========== STEP 3: Cohort ==========

-- The final temp table in the exclusion sequence becomes temp_cohort.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cohort AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step2;

-- ========== STEP 4: Variables ==========

-- 4.1 Clinically relevant depression
-- STEP 4.1.1: Map 'have little interest in doing things' to score, assigning 0 for nulls
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_have_little_interest_in_doing_things_score AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN f."have_little_interest_in_doing_things" IS NULL THEN 0
    WHEN f."have_little_interest_in_doing_things" = 'Not at all' THEN 0
    WHEN f."have_little_interest_in_doing_things" = 'Several days' THEN 1
    WHEN f."have_little_interest_in_doing_things" = 'More than half the days' THEN 2
    WHEN f."have_little_interest_in_doing_things" = 'Nearly every day' THEN 3
    ELSE 0 -- Default for unexpected values, though schema implies exhaustive list
  END AS "have_little_interest_in_doing_things_score"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- STEP 4.1.2: Map 'feeling down depressed or hopeless' to score, assigning 0 for nulls
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_feeling_down_depressed_or_hopeless_score AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN f."feeling_down_depressed_or_hopeless" IS NULL THEN 0
    WHEN f."feeling_down_depressed_or_hopeless" = 'Not at all' THEN 0
    WHEN f."feeling_down_depressed_or_hopeless" = 'Several days' THEN 1
    WHEN f."feeling_down_depressed_or_hopeless" = 'More than half the days' THEN 2
    WHEN f."feeling_down_depressed_or_hopeless" = 'Nearly every day' THEN 3
    ELSE 0
  END AS "feeling_down_depressed_or_hopeless_score"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- STEP 4.1.3: Map 'trouble sleeping or sleeping too much' to score, assigning 0 for nulls
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_trouble_sleeping_or_sleeping_too_much_score AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN f."trouble_sleeping_or_sleeping_too_much" IS NULL THEN 0
    WHEN f."trouble_sleeping_or_sleeping_too_much" = 'Not at all' THEN 0
    WHEN f."trouble_sleeping_or_sleeping_too_much" = 'Several days' THEN 1
    WHEN f."trouble_sleeping_or_sleeping_too_much" = 'More than half the days' THEN 2
    WHEN f."trouble_sleeping_or_sleeping_too_much" = 'Nearly every day' THEN 3
    ELSE 0
  END AS "trouble_sleeping_or_sleeping_too_much_score"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- STEP 4.1.4: Map 'feeling tired or having little energy' to score, assigning 0 for nulls
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_feeling_tired_or_having_little_energy_score AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN f."feeling_tired_or_having_little_energy" IS NULL THEN 0
    WHEN f."feeling_tired_or_having_little_energy" = 'Not at all' THEN 0
    WHEN f."feeling_tired_or_having_little_energy" = 'Several days' THEN 1
    WHEN f."feeling_tired_or_having_little_energy" = 'More than half the days' THEN 2
    WHEN f."feeling_tired_or_having_little_energy" = 'Nearly every day' THEN 3
    ELSE 0
  END AS "feeling_tired_or_having_little_energy_score"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- STEP 4.1.5: Map 'poor appetite or overeating' to score, assigning 0 for nulls
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_poor_appetite_or_overeating_score AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN f."poor_appetite_or_overeating" IS NULL THEN 0
    WHEN f."poor_appetite_or_overeating" = 'Not at all' THEN 0
    WHEN f."poor_appetite_or_overeating" = 'Several days' THEN 1
    WHEN f."poor_appetite_or_overeating" = 'More than half the days' THEN 2
    WHEN f."poor_appetite_or_overeating" = 'Nearly every day' THEN 3
    ELSE 0
  END AS "poor_appetite_or_overeating_score"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- STEP 4.1.6: Map 'feeling bad about yourself' to score, assigning 0 for nulls
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_feeling_bad_about_yourself_score AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN f."feeling_bad_about_yourself" IS NULL THEN 0
    WHEN f."feeling_bad_about_yourself" = 'Not at all' THEN 0
    WHEN f."feeling_bad_about_yourself" = 'Several days' THEN 1
    WHEN f."feeling_bad_about_yourself" = 'More than half the days' THEN 2
    WHEN f."feeling_bad_about_yourself" = 'Nearly every day' THEN 3
    ELSE 0
  END AS "feeling_bad_about_yourself_score"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- STEP 4.1.7: Map 'trouble concentrating on things' to score, assigning 0 for nulls
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_trouble_concentrating_on_things_score AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN f."trouble_concentrating_on_things" IS NULL THEN 0
    WHEN f."trouble_concentrating_on_things" = 'Not at all' THEN 0
    WHEN f."trouble_concentrating_on_things" = 'Several days' THEN 1
    WHEN f."trouble_concentrating_on_things" = 'More than half the days' THEN 2
    WHEN f."trouble_concentrating_on_things" = 'Nearly every day' THEN 3
    ELSE 0
  END AS "trouble_concentrating_on_things_score"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- STEP 4.1.8: Map 'moving or speaking slowly or too fast' to score, assigning 0 for nulls
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_moving_or_speaking_slowly_or_too_fast_score AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN f."moving_or_speaking_slowly_or_too_fast" IS NULL THEN 0
    WHEN f."moving_or_speaking_slowly_or_too_fast" = 'Not at all' THEN 0
    WHEN f."moving_or_speaking_slowly_or_too_fast" = 'Several days' THEN 1
    WHEN f."moving_or_speaking_slowly_or_too_fast" = 'More than half the days' THEN 2
    WHEN f."moving_or_speaking_slowly_or_too_fast" = 'Nearly every day' THEN 3
    ELSE 0
  END AS "moving_or_speaking_slowly_or_too_fast_score"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- STEP 4.1.9: Map 'thought you would be better off dead' to score, assigning 0 for nulls
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_thought_you_would_be_better_off_dead_score AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN f."thought_you_would_be_better_off_dead" IS NULL THEN 0
    WHEN f."thought_you_would_be_better_off_dead" = 'Not at all' THEN 0
    WHEN f."thought_you_would_be_better_off_dead" = 'Several days' THEN 1
    WHEN f."thought_you_would_be_better_off_dead" = 'More than half the days' THEN 2
    WHEN f."thought_you_would_be_better_off_dead" = 'Nearly every day' THEN 3
    ELSE 0
  END AS "thought_you_would_be_better_off_dead_score"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- STEP 4.1.10: Calculate total score
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_total_depression_score AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  COALESCE(s1."have_little_interest_in_doing_things_score", 0) +
  COALESCE(s2."feeling_down_depressed_or_hopeless_score", 0) +
  COALESCE(s3."trouble_sleeping_or_sleeping_too_much_score", 0) +
  COALESCE(s4."feeling_tired_or_having_little_energy_score", 0) +
  COALESCE(s5."poor_appetite_or_overeating_score", 0) +
  COALESCE(s6."feeling_bad_about_yourself_score", 0) +
  COALESCE(s7."trouble_concentrating_on_things_score", 0) +
  COALESCE(s8."moving_or_speaking_slowly_or_too_fast_score", 0) +
  COALESCE(s9."thought_you_would_be_better_off_dead_score", 0) AS "total_score"
FROM temp_cohort c
LEFT JOIN temp_have_little_interest_in_doing_things_score s1 ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = s1."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_feeling_down_depressed_or_hopeless_score s2 ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = s2."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_trouble_sleeping_or_sleeping_too_much_score s3 ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = s3."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_feeling_tired_or_having_little_energy_score s4 ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = s4."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_poor_appetite_or_overeating_score s5 ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = s5."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_feeling_bad_about_yourself_score s6 ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = s6."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_trouble_concentrating_on_things_score s7 ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = s7."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_moving_or_speaking_slowly_or_too_fast_score s8 ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = s8."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_thought_you_would_be_better_off_dead_score s9 ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = s9."respondent_sequence_number";

-- STEP 4.1.11: Define clinically relevant depression based on total score
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_clinically_relevant_depression AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN "total_score" >= 10 THEN 1
    ELSE 0
  END AS "clinically_relevant_depression"
FROM temp_total_depression_score;

-- ========== STEP 5: Final Table ==========
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_table AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  crd."clinically_relevant_depression"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN temp_clinically_relevant_depression crd ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = crd."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 6: View Output ==========
SELECT * FROM temp_final_table;

-- STEP: Create merged final table with design variables + in_analysis flag
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_final_with_weights;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_with_weights AS
SELECT 
    wd."respondent_sequence_number",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_psu",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_stratum",
    wd."survey_weight",
    CASE WHEN ft."respondent_sequence_number" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "in_analysis",
    ft."clinically_relevant_depression"
FROM weight_design wd
LEFT JOIN temp_final_table ft
  ON wd."respondent_sequence_number" = ft."respondent_sequence_number";
  
-- Preview the result

R:
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(dplyr))
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(broom))
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tibble))

    identifier_vars <- c("respondent_sequence_number")
    outcome_vars <- c("clinically_relevant_depression")
    weight_vars <- c("survey_weight","masked_variance_pseudo_psu","masked_variance_pseudo_stratum","in_analysis")

    cohort <- df[df$in_analysis == 1, names(df) != "in_analysis"]


    outcome_roles <- c()
    outcome_roles["clinically_relevant_depression"] <- "outcome"


    summarize_variable <- function(column, name) {
    n_unique <- length(unique(na.omit(column)))
    na_count <- sum(is.na(column))

    if (name %in% identifier_vars) {
        category <- "identifier"
        summary_info <- paste0("Total rows = ", nrow(cohort))

    } else if (name %in% outcome_vars) {
        # Assign its special role (e.g., "outcome", "mediator")
        category <- ifelse(!is.na(outcome_roles[name]), outcome_roles[name], "outcome")

        # Generate a summary based on its underlying data type
        underlying_type <- case_when(
        n_unique == 2                                 ~ "binary",
        is.numeric(column) & n_unique > 2             ~ "numerical",
        is.character(column) | is.factor(column)      ~ "categorical",
        TRUE                                          ~ "other"
        )

        if (underlying_type == "numerical") {
        mean_val <- round(mean(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        sd_val   <- round(sd(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        summary_info <- paste0("mean = ", mean_val, ", sd = ", sd_val)
        } else if (underlying_type %in% c("categorical", "binary")) {
        tbl <- prop.table(table(column)) * 100
        tbl <- round(tbl, 1)
        summary_info <- paste0(names(tbl), ": ", tbl, "%", collapse = "; ")
        } else {
        summary_info <- NA
        }

    

    } else if (name %in% weight_vars) {
        category <- "weight"
        summary_info <- "Weight variable" 
    

    } else {
        # This block handles regular predictors
        category <- case_when(
        n_unique == 2                                 ~ "binary",
        is.numeric(column) & n_unique > 2             ~ "numerical",
        is.character(column) | is.factor(column)      ~ "categorical",
        TRUE                                          ~ "other"
        )

        if (category == "numerical") {
        mean_val <- round(mean(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        sd_val   <- round(sd(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        summary_info <- paste0("mean = ", mean_val, ", sd = ", sd_val)
        } else if (category %in% c("categorical", "binary")) {
        tbl <- prop.table(table(column)) * 100
        tbl <- round(tbl, 1)
        summary_info <- paste0(names(tbl), ": ", tbl, "%", collapse = "; ")
        } else {
        summary_info <- NA
        }
    }

    data.frame(
        variable   = name,
        category   = category,
        n_unique   = n_unique,
        na_count   = na_count,
        summary    = summary_info,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    }

    report <- bind_rows(
    lapply(names(cohort), function(col_name) {
        summarize_variable(cohort[[col_name]], col_name)
    })
    )

    identifier_vars  <- report$variable[report$category == "identifier"]
    cat("Identifier Variables:\n");   print(identifier_vars);   cat("\n")

    weight_vars <- report$variable[report$category == "weight"]; cat("Weight Variables: "); print(weight_vars); psu_var <- weight_vars[grepl("psu", weight_vars, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]; cat("PSU:", psu_var); stratum_var <- weight_vars[grepl("stratum", weight_vars, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]; cat("Stratum:", stratum_var); weight_var <- weight_vars[grepl("weight", weight_vars, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]; cat("Weight:", weight_var); in_analysis_var <- weight_vars[grepl("in_analysis", weight_vars, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]; cat("In Analysis:", in_analysis_var)

    binary_vars      <- report$variable[report$category == "binary"]
    cat("Binary Variables:\n");       print(binary_vars);       cat("\n")
    print(binary_vars)

    categorical_vars <- report$variable[report$category == "categorical"]
    cat("Categorical Variables:\n");  print(categorical_vars);  cat("\n")
    print(categorical_vars)

    numerical_vars   <- report$variable[report$category == "numerical"]
    cat("Numerical Variables:\n");    print(numerical_vars);    cat("\n")
    print(numerical_vars)

    
    

    outcome_var     <- report$variable[report$category %in% c("outcome")]
    cat("Outcome Variables:\n");      print(outcome_var);      cat("\n")
    

    
    library(survey)
    options(survey.lonely.psu = "adjust")
        
    
    group_vars_list <- report$variable[report$category %in% c("categorical", "binary")]
    
    # Loop through the variables and ensure they are clean factors in the 'df' dataframe.
    for (var in group_vars_list) {
    if (var %in% names(df)) {
        df[[var]] <- factor(trimws(as.character(df[[var]])))
    }
    }
        
    
    df[[outcome_var]] <- ifelse(tolower(df[[outcome_var]]) == "yes", 1,
                    ifelse(tolower(df[[outcome_var]]) == "no", 0,
                    ifelse(grepl("1", as.character(df[[outcome_var]])), 1,
                    ifelse(grepl("0", as.character(df[[outcome_var]])), 0,
                            as.numeric(df[[outcome_var]])))))


    varformula <- as.formula(paste0("~", outcome_var))
        
    
    survey_design <- svydesign(
        ids     = as.formula(paste0("~", psu_var)),
        strata  = as.formula(paste0("~", stratum_var)),
        weights = as.formula(paste0("~", weight_var)),
        data    = df,
        nest    = TRUE
        )
    survey_design <- subset(survey_design, in_analysis ==1)
        
    
    # Calculate Overall Prevalence.
    total_prev <- svymean(varformula, survey_design, na.rm = TRUE)
    total_conf <- confint(total_prev)

    # Initialize a list to store pairwise results
    pairwise_results <- list()

    # Loop through each grouping variable
    all_strat_results <- lapply(group_vars_list, function(current_group_var) {

        byformula <- as.formula(paste0("~", current_group_var))
        test_formula <- as.formula(paste0(outcome_var, " ~ ", current_group_var))

        # Prevalence and confidence intervals
        strat_prev <- svyby(varformula, byformula, survey_design, svymean, na.rm = TRUE)
        strat_conf <- confint(strat_prev)

        strat_result <- as_tibble(strat_prev) %>%
            cbind(strat_conf) %>%
            rename(
                Group = 1,
                prevalence = 2,
                conf_low = `2.5 %`,
                conf_high = `97.5 %`
            ) %>%
            mutate(Variable = current_group_var, .before = 1)

        # --- Global P-value ---
        group_levels <- levels(factor(df[[current_group_var]]))
        num_levels <- length(group_levels)
        global_p_value <- NA_real_

        test_result <- NULL
        test_p <- NA_real_

        if (num_levels == 2) {
            test_result <- tryCatch(
                svyttest(test_formula, survey_design),
                error = function(e) NULL
            )
        } else if (num_levels > 2) {
            chisq_formula <- as.formula(paste0("~", outcome_var, " + ", current_group_var))
            test_result <- tryCatch(
                svychisq(chisq_formula, survey_design),
                error = function(e) NULL
            )
        }

        if (!is.null(test_result)) {
            test_p <- tryCatch(test_result$p.value, error = function(e) NA_real_)
        }
        global_p_value <- test_p

        # Add global p-value only to the first row
        strat_result$`P-value` <- ""
        strat_result$`P-value`[1] <- if (!is.na(global_p_value)) round(global_p_value, 4) else NA_character_

        # Keep only the columns needed in the final result table
        strat_result <- strat_result %>%
            dplyr::select(Variable, Group, prevalence, conf_low, conf_high, `P-value`)

        # --- Pairwise p-values table (kept as before) ---
        pairwise_df <- tibble(
            Variable = character(),
            Comparison = character(),
            `P-value` = numeric()
        )

        if (num_levels > 2) {
            all_pairs <- combn(group_levels, 2, simplify = FALSE)
            for (pair in all_pairs) {
                pair_name <- paste(pair[1], "vs", pair[2], sep = "_")
                pair_design <- subset(survey_design, get(current_group_var) %in% pair)
                test_result <- try(svyttest(test_formula, pair_design), silent = TRUE)
                if (!inherits(test_result, "try-error")) {
                    pairwise_df <- bind_rows(pairwise_df, tibble(
                        Variable = current_group_var,
                        Comparison = pair_name,
                        `P-value` = round(test_result$p.value, 4)
                    ))
                }
            }
        }

        # Store in global list
        pairwise_results[[current_group_var]] <<- pairwise_df

        return(strat_result)
    })

    
    # Combine into a final result table
    total_result_df <- tibble(
        Variable = "Overall",
        Group = "Overall",
        prevalence = as.numeric(coef(total_prev)),
        conf_low = as.numeric(total_conf[1]),
        conf_high = as.numeric(total_conf[2]),
        `P-value` = ""
    )

    combined_strat_df <- bind_rows(all_strat_results)
    result_table <- bind_rows(total_result_df, combined_strat_df) %>%
        dplyr::select(Variable, Group, prevalence, conf_low, conf_high, `P-value`)

    # Combine pairwise p-values into one data frame (unchanged)
    pairwise_pvalue_table <- bind_rows(pairwise_results)

Question:
Among participants in the 2005-2012 NHANES data, include paricipants who meet all of these criteria: self-reported diagnosis of diabetes is yes and diabetes onset >=30  and age at screening >=30
We will exclude patients who were pregnant at the time of the exam, exclude patipant whose difference between the duration of diabetes and duration of insulin therapy, calculated as (age at screening - diabetes onset)- insulin therapy duration is equal or less than 1 year.
We will calculate the weighted prevalence using exam weights. We will look at prevalence of clinically relevant depression, defined by the following 9 questionaires:
"have little interest in doing things", "feeling down, depressed, or hopeless", "trouble sleeping or sleeping too much", "feeling tired or having little energy", "poor appetite or overeating", "feeling bad about yourself", "trouble concentrating on things", "moving or speaking slowly or too fast", "thought you would be better off dead". 
The total score from the nine questions were calculated where each question has value of Not at all (0), Several days (1), More than half the days (2), Nearly every day (3), if value is null assign (0), and the total score >=10 was defined as clinically relevant depression and else was not.
Structured Question:
Analysis Type: weighted prevalence (exam)

Dataset: NHANES

Period of Interest: 2005-2012

Inclusion Criteria:
- self-reported diagnosis of diabetes = yes
- diabetes onset >= 30
- age at screening >= 30

Exclusion Criteria:
- pregnant at the time of the exam
- (age at screening - diabetes onset) - insulin therapy duration <= 1 year

Grouping Variables: None

Outcome:
- clinically relevant depression = 1 if total score >= 10; 0 otherwise
  total score calculated as the sum of the scores from the following 9 questionnaires:
    - "have little interest in doing things"
    - "feeling down, depressed, or hopeless"
    - "trouble sleeping or sleeping too much"
    - "feeling tired or having little energy"
    - "poor appetite or overeating"
    - "feeling bad about yourself"
    - "trouble concentrating on things"
    - "moving or speaking slowly or too fast"
    - "thought you would be better off dead"
  Each question's score is mapped as:
    - Not at all = 0
    - Several days = 1
    - More than half the days = 2
    - Nearly every day = 3
  If a question's value is null, assign 0.

SQL:
-- STEP 1: Create temp_master_weight

-- TEMP TABLE FOR weight
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_weight;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_weight AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 8.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_d
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 8.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_e
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 8.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_f
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight * 2.0 / 8.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_g
WHERE full_sample_2_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL;


-- STEP 2: Create temp_psu_stratum

-- TEMP TABLE FOR PSU and Stratum
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_psu_stratum;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_psu_stratum AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_e
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_g;


-- STEP 3: Create final weight+design table
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS weight_design;
CREATE TABLE weight_design AS
SELECT 
    s.respondent_sequence_number,
    s.masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
    s.masked_variance_pseudo_stratum,
    w.survey_weight
FROM temp_psu_stratum s
INNER JOIN temp_master_weight w
  ON s.respondent_sequence_number = w.respondent_sequence_number;




-- TEMP TABLE FOR "self-reported diagnosis of diabetes"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_g
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_e;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes ON temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "diabetes onset (years)", "diabetes onset (years)"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_age_when_first_told_you_had_diabetes;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_age_when_first_told_you_had_diabetes AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "age_when_first_told_you_had_diabetes" AS "age_when_first_told_you_had_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "age_when_first_told_you_had_diabetes" AS "age_when_first_told_you_had_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_g
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "age_when_first_told_you_had_diabetes" AS "age_when_first_told_you_had_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "age_when_first_told_you_had_diabetes" AS "age_when_first_told_you_had_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_e;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_age_when_first_told_you_had_diabetes ON temp_master_age_when_first_told_you_had_diabetes (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "age at screening (years)", "age at screening (years)"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_in_years_at_screening"

-- FINAL MASTER TABLE
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS final_master_table;
CREATE TABLE final_master_table AS
SELECT
    a.respondent_sequence_number,
    t0."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes",
    t1."age_when_first_told_you_had_diabetes",
    t2."age_in_years_at_screening",
    t3."pregnancy_status_at_exam",
    t4."how_long_taking_insulin",
    t5."have_little_interest_in_doing_things",
    t6."feeling_down_depressed_or_hopeless",
    t7."trouble_sleeping_or_sleeping_too_much",
    t8."feeling_tired_or_having_little_energy",
    t9."poor_appetite_or_overeating",
    t10."feeling_bad_about_yourself",
    t11."trouble_concentrating_on_things",
    t12."moving_or_speaking_slowly_or_too_fast",
    t13."thought_you_would_be_better_off_dead"
FROM temp_all_ids a
LEFT JOIN temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes t0 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t0.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_age_when_first_told_you_had_diabetes t1 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t1.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening t2 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t2.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_pregnancy_status_at_exam t3 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t3.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_how_long_taking_insulin t4 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t4.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_have_little_interest_in_doing_things t5 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t5.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_feeling_down_depressed_or_hopeless t6 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t6.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_trouble_sleeping_or_sleeping_too_much t7 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t7.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_feeling_tired_or_having_little_energy t8 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t8.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_poor_appetite_or_overeating t9 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t9.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_feeling_bad_about_yourself t10 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t10.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_trouble_concentrating_on_things t11 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t11.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_moving_or_speaking_slowly_or_too_fast t12 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t12.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_thought_you_would_be_better_off_dead t13 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t13.respondent_sequence_number;

CREATE INDEX idx_final_master_respondent_sequence_number    
    ON final_master_table (respondent_sequence_number);


-- Clean up final_master_table
DELETE FROM final_master_table
WHERE respondent_sequence_number NOT IN (
    SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM weight_design
);


-- ========== STEP 1: Inclusion ==========

-- STEP 1.1: Includes all patients with self-reported diagnosis of diabetes = 'Yes'
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step1 AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM final_master_table
WHERE "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" = 'Yes';

-- STEP 1.2: From the above group, include only those with diabetes onset >= 30 years
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."age_when_first_told_you_had_diabetes" >= 30;

-- STEP 1.3: From the above group, include only those with age at screening >= 30 years
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step3 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."age_in_years_at_screening" >= 30;

-- ========== STEP 2: Exclusions ==========

-- STEP 2.1: Exclude patients who were pregnant at the time of the exam
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step1 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step3 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."pregnancy_status_at_exam" IS NULL
   OR f."pregnancy_status_at_exam" NOT IN ('Yes, positive lab pregnancy test or self-reported pregnant at exam');

-- STEP 2.2: Exclude participants whose difference between duration of diabetes and insulin therapy duration is <= 1 year
-- First, calculate 'duration since diabetes onset (years)'
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_duration_since_diabetes_onset AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  (f."age_in_years_at_screening" - f."age_when_first_told_you_had_diabetes") AS "duration_since_diabetes_onset_years"
FROM temp_exclusion_step1 c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Next, calculate 'duration since diabetes onset minus insulin therapy duration (years)'
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_duration_diff AS
SELECT
  d."respondent_sequence_number",
  (d."duration_since_diabetes_onset_years" - f."how_long_taking_insulin") AS "duration_since_diabetes_onset_minus_insulin_therapy_duration_years"
FROM temp_duration_since_diabetes_onset d
JOIN final_master_table f ON d."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Now, apply the exclusion based on the derived duration difference
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step1 i
LEFT JOIN temp_duration_diff td ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = td."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE td."duration_since_diabetes_onset_minus_insulin_therapy_duration_years" IS NULL
   OR td."duration_since_diabetes_onset_minus_insulin_therapy_duration_years" > 1;

-- ========== STEP 3: Cohort ==========

-- The final temp table in the exclusion sequence becomes temp_cohort.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cohort AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step2;

-- ========== STEP 4: Variables ==========

-- 4.1 Clinically Relevant Depression

-- Step 1: Assign 0 if question value is null, otherwise use the question value for mapping.

JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Step 2: Map each question's value to a score.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_have_little_interest_in_doing_things_score AS
SELECT
  p."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE p."have_little_interest_in_doing_things_pre_mapped"
    WHEN 'Not at all' THEN 0
    WHEN 'Several days' THEN 1
    WHEN 'More than half the days' THEN 2
    WHEN 'Nearly every day' THEN 3
    ELSE 0 -- This covers the '0' assigned for NULLs in the pre_mapped step
  END AS "have_little_interest_in_doing_things_score"
FROM temp_have_little_interest_in_doing_things_pre_mapped p;

  END AS "feeling_bad_about_yourself_score"

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_trouble_concentrating_on_things_score AS
SELECT
  p."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE p."trouble_concentrating_on_things_pre_mapped"
    WHEN 'Not at all' THEN 0
    WHEN 'Several days' THEN 1
    WHEN 'More than half the days' THEN 2
    WHEN 'Nearly every day' THEN 3
    ELSE 0
  END AS "trouble_concentrating_on_things_score"
FROM temp_trouble_concentrating_on_things_pre_mapped p;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_moving_or_speaking_slowly_or_too_fast_score AS
SELECT
  p."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE p."moving_or_speaking_slowly_or_too_fast_pre_mapped"
    WHEN 'Not at all' THEN 0
    WHEN 'Several days' THEN 1
    WHEN 'More than half the days' THEN 2
    WHEN 'Nearly every day' THEN 3
    ELSE 0
  END AS "moving_or_speaking_slowly_or_too_fast_score"
FROM temp_moving_or_speaking_slowly_or_too_fast_pre_mapped p;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_thought_you_would_be_better_off_dead_score AS
SELECT
  p."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE p."thought_you_would_be_better_off_dead_pre_mapped"
    WHEN 'Not at all' THEN 0
    WHEN 'Several days' THEN 1
    WHEN 'More than half the days' THEN 2
    WHEN 'Nearly every day' THEN 3
    ELSE 0
  END AS "thought_you_would_be_better_off_dead_score"
FROM temp_thought_you_would_be_better_off_dead_pre_mapped p;

-- Step 3: Calculate total score = sum of all 9 question scores
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_total_score AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  COALESCE(s1."have_little_interest_in_doing_things_score", 0) +
  COALESCE(s2."feeling_down_depressed_or_hopeless_score", 0) +
  COALESCE(s3."trouble_sleeping_or_sleeping_too_much_score", 0) +
  COALESCE(s4."feeling_tired_or_having_little_energy_score", 0) +
  COALESCE(s5."poor_appetite_or_overeating_score", 0) +
  COALESCE(s6."feeling_bad_about_yourself_score", 0) +
  COALESCE(s7."trouble_concentrating_on_things_score", 0) +
  COALESCE(s8."moving_or_speaking_slowly_or_too_fast_score", 0) +
  COALESCE(s9."thought_you_would_be_better_off_dead_score", 0) AS "total_score"
FROM temp_cohort c
LEFT JOIN temp_have_little_interest_in_doing_things_score s1 ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = s1."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_feeling_down_depressed_or_hopeless_score s2 ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = s2."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_trouble_sleeping_or_sleeping_too_much_score s3 ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = s3."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_feeling_tired_or_having_little_energy_score s4 ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = s4."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_poor_appetite_or_overeating_score s5 ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = s5."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_feeling_bad_about_yourself_score s6 ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = s6."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_trouble_concentrating_on_things_score s7 ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = s7."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_moving_or_speaking_slowly_or_too_fast_score s8 ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = s8."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_thought_you_would_be_better_off_dead_score s9 ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = s9."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Step 4: clinically relevant depression = 1 if total score >= 10; 0 otherwise
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_clinically_relevant_depression AS
SELECT
  t."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN t."total_score" >= 10 THEN 1
    ELSE 0
  END AS "clinically_relevant_depression"
FROM temp_total_score t;

-- ========== STEP 5: Final Table ==========
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_table AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  crd."clinically_relevant_depression"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN temp_clinically_relevant_depression crd ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = crd."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 6: View Output ==========
SELECT * FROM temp_final_table;

-- STEP: Create merged final table with design variables + in_analysis flag
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_final_with_weights;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_with_weights AS
SELECT 
    wd."respondent_sequence_number",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_psu",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_stratum",
    wd."survey_weight",
    CASE WHEN ft."respondent_sequence_number" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "in_analysis",
    ft."clinically_relevant_depression"
FROM weight_design wd
LEFT JOIN temp_final_table ft
  ON wd."respondent_sequence_number" = ft."respondent_sequence_number";

R:
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(dplyr))
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(broom))
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tibble))

    identifier_vars <- c("respondent_sequence_number")
    outcome_vars <- c("clinically_relevant_depression")
    weight_vars <- c("survey_weight","masked_variance_pseudo_psu","masked_variance_pseudo_stratum","in_analysis")

    cohort <- df[df$in_analysis == 1, names(df) != "in_analysis"]


    outcome_roles <- c()
    outcome_roles["clinically_relevant_depression"] <- "outcome"


    summarize_variable <- function(column, name) {
    n_unique <- length(unique(na.omit(column)))
    na_count <- sum(is.na(column))

    if (name %in% identifier_vars) {
        category <- "identifier"
        summary_info <- paste0("Total rows = ", nrow(cohort))

    } else if (name %in% outcome_vars) {
        # Assign its special role (e.g., "outcome", "mediator")
        category <- ifelse(!is.na(outcome_roles[name]), outcome_roles[name], "outcome")

        # Generate a summary based on its underlying data type
        underlying_type <- case_when(
        n_unique == 2                                 ~ "binary",
        is.numeric(column) & n_unique > 2             ~ "numerical",
        is.character(column) | is.factor(column)      ~ "categorical",
        TRUE                                          ~ "other"
        )

        if (underlying_type == "numerical") {
        mean_val <- round(mean(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        sd_val   <- round(sd(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        summary_info <- paste0("mean = ", mean_val, ", sd = ", sd_val)
        } else if (underlying_type %in% c("categorical", "binary")) {
        tbl <- prop.table(table(column)) * 100
        tbl <- round(tbl, 1)
        summary_info <- paste0(names(tbl), ": ", tbl, "%", collapse = "; ")
        } else {
        summary_info <- NA
        }

    

    } else if (name %in% weight_vars) {
        category <- "weight"
        summary_info <- "Weight variable" 
    

    } else {
        # This block handles regular predictors
        category <- case_when(
        n_unique == 2                                 ~ "binary",
        is.numeric(column) & n_unique > 2             ~ "numerical",
        is.character(column) | is.factor(column)      ~ "categorical",
        TRUE                                          ~ "other"
        )

        if (category == "numerical") {
        mean_val <- round(mean(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        sd_val   <- round(sd(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        summary_info <- paste0("mean = ", mean_val, ", sd = ", sd_val)
        } else if (category %in% c("categorical", "binary")) {
        tbl <- prop.table(table(column)) * 100
        tbl <- round(tbl, 1)
        summary_info <- paste0(names(tbl), ": ", tbl, "%", collapse = "; ")
        } else {
        summary_info <- NA
        }
    }

    data.frame(
        variable   = name,
        category   = category,
        n_unique   = n_unique,
        na_count   = na_count,
        summary    = summary_info,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    }

    report <- bind_rows(
    lapply(names(cohort), function(col_name) {
        summarize_variable(cohort[[col_name]], col_name)
    })
    )

    identifier_vars  <- report$variable[report$category == "identifier"]
    cat("Identifier Variables:\n");   print(identifier_vars);   cat("\n")

    weight_vars <- report$variable[report$category == "weight"]; cat("Weight Variables: "); print(weight_vars); psu_var <- weight_vars[grepl("psu", weight_vars, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]; cat("PSU:", psu_var); stratum_var <- weight_vars[grepl("stratum", weight_vars, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]; cat("Stratum:", stratum_var); weight_var <- weight_vars[grepl("weight", weight_vars, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]; cat("Weight:", weight_var); in_analysis_var <- weight_vars[grepl("in_analysis", weight_vars, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]; cat("In Analysis:", in_analysis_var)

    binary_vars      <- report$variable[report$category == "binary"]
    cat("Binary Variables:\n");       print(binary_vars);       cat("\n")
    print(binary_vars)

    categorical_vars <- report$variable[report$category == "categorical"]
    cat("Categorical Variables:\n");  print(categorical_vars);  cat("\n")
    print(categorical_vars)

    numerical_vars   <- report$variable[report$category == "numerical"]
    cat("Numerical Variables:\n");    print(numerical_vars);    cat("\n")
    print(numerical_vars)

    
    

    outcome_var     <- report$variable[report$category %in% c("outcome")]
    cat("Outcome Variables:\n");      print(outcome_var);      cat("\n")
    

    
    library(survey)
    options(survey.lonely.psu = "adjust")
        
    
    group_vars_list <- report$variable[report$category %in% c("categorical", "binary")]
    
    # Loop through the variables and ensure they are clean factors in the 'df' dataframe.
    for (var in group_vars_list) {
    if (var %in% names(df)) {
        df[[var]] <- factor(trimws(as.character(df[[var]])))
    }
    }
        
    
    df[[outcome_var]] <- ifelse(tolower(df[[outcome_var]]) == "yes", 1,
                    ifelse(tolower(df[[outcome_var]]) == "no", 0,
                    ifelse(grepl("1", as.character(df[[outcome_var]])), 1,
                    ifelse(grepl("0", as.character(df[[outcome_var]])), 0,
                            as.numeric(df[[outcome_var]])))))


    varformula <- as.formula(paste0("~", outcome_var))
        
    
    survey_design <- svydesign(
        ids     = as.formula(paste0("~", psu_var)),
        strata  = as.formula(paste0("~", stratum_var)),
        weights = as.formula(paste0("~", weight_var)),
        data    = df,
        nest    = TRUE
        )
    survey_design <- subset(survey_design, in_analysis ==1)
        
    
    # Calculate Overall Prevalence.
    total_prev <- svymean(varformula, survey_design, na.rm = TRUE)
    total_conf <- confint(total_prev)

    # Initialize a list to store pairwise results
    pairwise_results <- list()

    # Loop through each grouping variable
    all_strat_results <- lapply(group_vars_list, function(current_group_var) {

        byformula <- as.formula(paste0("~", current_group_var))
        test_formula <- as.formula(paste0(outcome_var, " ~ ", current_group_var))

        # Prevalence and confidence intervals
        strat_prev <- svyby(varformula, byformula, survey_design, svymean, na.rm = TRUE)
        strat_conf <- confint(strat_prev)

        strat_result <- as_tibble(strat_prev) %>%
            cbind(strat_conf) %>%
            rename(
                Group = 1,
                prevalence = 2,
                conf_low = `2.5 %`,
                conf_high = `97.5 %`
            ) %>%
            mutate(Variable = current_group_var, .before = 1)

        # --- Global P-value ---
        group_levels <- levels(factor(df[[current_group_var]]))
        num_levels <- length(group_levels)
        global_p_value <- NA_real_

        test_result <- NULL
        test_p <- NA_real_

        if (num_levels == 2) {
            test_result <- tryCatch(
                svyttest(test_formula, survey_design),
                error = function(e) NULL
            )
        } else if (num_levels > 2) {
            chisq_formula <- as.formula(paste0("~", outcome_var, " + ", current_group_var))
            test_result <- tryCatch(
                svychisq(chisq_formula, survey_design),
                error = function(e) NULL
            )
        }

        if (!is.null(test_result)) {
            test_p <- tryCatch(test_result$p.value, error = function(e) NA_real_)
        }
        global_p_value <- test_p

        # Add global p-value only to the first row
        strat_result$`P-value` <- ""
        strat_result$`P-value`[1] <- if (!is.na(global_p_value)) round(global_p_value, 4) else NA_character_

        # Keep only the columns needed in the final result table
        strat_result <- strat_result %>%
            dplyr::select(Variable, Group, prevalence, conf_low, conf_high, `P-value`)

        # --- Pairwise p-values table (kept as before) ---
        pairwise_df <- tibble(
            Variable = character(),
            Comparison = character(),
            `P-value` = numeric()
        )

        if (num_levels > 2) {
            all_pairs <- combn(group_levels, 2, simplify = FALSE)
            for (pair in all_pairs) {
                pair_name <- paste(pair[1], "vs", pair[2], sep = "_")
                pair_design <- subset(survey_design, get(current_group_var) %in% pair)
                test_result <- try(svyttest(test_formula, pair_design), silent = TRUE)
                if (!inherits(test_result, "try-error")) {
                    pairwise_df <- bind_rows(pairwise_df, tibble(
                        Variable = current_group_var,
                        Comparison = pair_name,
                        `P-value` = round(test_result$p.value, 4)
                    ))
                }
            }
        }

        # Store in global list
        pairwise_results[[current_group_var]] <<- pairwise_df

        return(strat_result)
    })

    
    # Combine into a final result table
    total_result_df <- tibble(
        Variable = "Overall",
        Group = "Overall",
        prevalence = as.numeric(coef(total_prev)),
        conf_low = as.numeric(total_conf[1]),
        conf_high = as.numeric(total_conf[2]),
        `P-value` = ""
    )

    combined_strat_df <- bind_rows(all_strat_results)
    result_table <- bind_rows(total_result_df, combined_strat_df) %>%
        dplyr::select(Variable, Group, prevalence, conf_low, conf_high, `P-value`)

    # Combine pairwise p-values into one data frame (unchanged)
    pairwise_pvalue_table <- bind_rows(pairwise_results)
